GitLabSweet Tech AS / platform / handyfeeling-utils · GitLab​
GitLabPackage registry · Sweet Tech AS / platform / handyfeeling-u…​

Install packages before we are on NPM

Select the package in the utils repo: https://gitlab.com/sweettechas/platform/handyfeeling-utils/-/packages
Set registry setup to
Project-level
Copy the register command and run it in your project folder. Example:
echo @ohdoki:registry=https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/70424522/packages/npm/ >> .npmrc
​
Then run
npm i YYY
example
npm i @ohdoki/handy-rest-api-v3-client
